name: Chocolate Banana Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine oats, butter or margarine, and boiling water. Let stand for 20 minutes.
4. Stir in honey, vanilla, mashed bananas, and eggs; mix well.
5. Lightly spoon the flour into a measuring cup; level off.
6. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg.
7. By hand, stir the dry ingredients into the oat-banana mixture until well blended.
8. Fold in flaked coconut, chopped walnuts, and chocolate chips.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched lightly in the center. (The cake will not rise high.)
11. Serve warm. Makes 15 servings.
